title: stipa setigera var. glabrata
intro: Stipa setigera var. glabrata, also known as the hairy stipa, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stipa setigera var. glabrata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as an infusion, decoction, or topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
